reviews.comment:
Si vas de Mar Azul a Mar del Plata, esta es la única YPF-ACA antes del destino. Si no es imprescindible, conviene ir a la que hay en Mar del Plata, porque está se llena con los viajeros y con quienes están en la zona (Santa Clara, Mar de Cobo, etc.).

(Translated by Google)
If you're traveling from Mar Azul to Mar del Plata, this is the only YPF-ACA station before your destination. If it's not essential, it's best to go to the one in Mar del Plata, as this one gets crowded with travelers and locals (from Santa Clara, Mar de Cobo, etc.).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeDhqNE1BEAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar excelente muy limpios los baños , para los que van de paso es excelente tiene agua caliente para los termos .
Un amplio de galletitas entre otras cosas de kiosco buena ubicación para cargar NAFTA ya que para el gas tener que ir para mar del plata serán unos 15 minutos llegar hasta ahy o hagarrar ruta 11 y llegar a las estaciones

(Translated by Google)
The place is excellent, the bathrooms are very clean, and it's great for those passing through. It has hot water for thermoses. There's a wide selection of cookies and other kiosk items. It's a good location for filling up with gasoline, since for gas you have to go to Mar del Plata; it's about 15 minutes to get there or you can take Route 11 and get to the stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbTg2X1NBEAE

At nine in the morning the bathrooms were disgustingly dirty.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero algo lenta,cola y desorganización en la carga,creo que ya es hora de modernizarla sobre todo la disposición de los surtidores que están en linea y mejoraria mucho si los ponen en paralelo,el aire para inflar los neumáticos está siempre disponible y gratis cosa que no ocurre en todas las estaciones,hermoso parque

(Translated by Google)
Good service but a bit slow, with queues and disorganization at the pumps. I think it's time to modernize, especially the layout of the pumps, which are all in a line and would be much better if they were placed side by side. Air for inflating tires is always available and free, which isn't the case at all stations. Beautiful park.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNjZfbU5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo Infinia y cuando lleno el tanque la computadora de mi auto me indica que la autonomía es de 630km y a veces en otras estaciones es de 580km. Cargue y llene el tanque y ahora es de 460km/h. Claramente o bautizaron la nafta o te meten comun o super por Infinia. Nunca más cargo acá.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up with Infinia, and when I fill the tank, my car's computer tells me the range is 630 km, and sometimes at other stations it's 580 km. I filled up again, and now it's only going 460 km/h. Clearly, they either renamed the gasoline or they're passing off regular or premium as Infinia. I'm never filling up here again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJN2V1U0FnEAE
